Short CV

Research asistant AYŞE TAŞKIRAN was born in 1997 in İSTANBUL. She graduated from Şehit İlhan Kartal Anatolian High School in 2015. She started her undergraduate education at Üsküdar University, Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering in 2015, and graduated in 2020 with a high honor degree. During this period, she took part in the Tubitak 2209-A project. As of December 2022, she started to work as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Industrial Engineering.
